name: Nobel Center File Versions by File

assignments.name: name
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.name }}

assignments.name: file_path
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.file_path || $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.file_path }}

assignments.name: file_key
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.object_key || $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.file_key }}

assignments.name: new_version_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.version_id }}

assignments.name: old_version_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.has_prev ? $('Ensure Prev in MinIO').item.json.version_id : null }}

assignments.name: sp_etag
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_new.etag }}

assignments.name: sp_version_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_new.sp_version_id }}

assignments.name: sp_prev_etag
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_prev ? $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_prev.etag : null }}

assignments.name: sp_prev_version_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_prev ? $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.sp_prev.sp_version_id : null }}

assignments.name: cached
assignments.value: ={{ ($('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.cached === true) && (!$('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.has_prev || $('Ensure Prev in MinIO').item.json.cached === true) }}

assignments.name: sha256
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.sha256 }}

assignments.name: size_bytes
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.size_bytes }}

assignments.name: new_audit_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Ensure New in MinIO').item.json.audit_id }}

assignments.name: old_audit_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Pick Latest Two SP Versions').item.json.has_prev ? $('Ensure Prev in MinIO').item.json.audit_id : null }}
